sourceNote: Static rules used to translate Florida weather alerts into cautious homeowner guidance. This file is intentionally conservative and does not create panic language.

rules.headline: Florida Storm Tree Safety Advisory
rules.message: Tropical weather may increase tree failure risk. Stay away from leaning, cracked, or storm-damaged trees and avoid working under large limbs.

rules.headline: Severe Weather Tree Safety Notice
rules.message: Strong winds can turn weak limbs and damaged trees into hazards. Keep people, pets, and vehicles away from suspicious trees until conditions improve.

rules.headline: Saturated Soil Tree Risk Notice
rules.message: Flooding and saturated soil can reduce root stability. Watch for new leaning, soil lifting, or cracks around large trees after heavy rain.
